title: neo-urbania patella
intro: Neo-urbania patella, also known as the urban daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of the neo-urbania patella plant are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the neo-urbania patella plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
